name: classrpg-backend
description: ClassRPG Gamified Education Platform - Backend API

scripts.db:setup: node -e "import { readFileSync } from 'fs'; import pg from 'pg'; const { DB } = await import('./src/config.js'); const pool = new pg.Pool(DB); const schema = readFileSync('./schema.sql', 'utf8'); const seed = readFileSync('./seed.sql', 'utf8'); await pool.query(schema); await pool.query(seed); console.log('✅ Database setup complete'); process.exit(0);"
